name: Waterfall.io
description: A SaaS platform that connects analytics and search data (Google Analytics, Search Console, Ads, Bing, Shopify, HubSpot) to build dashboards and insights.

auth_methods.note: Waterfall states it uses OAuth 2.0 (where available) to request permissioned access when connecting third-party services, and it does not store third-party account passwords.

credential_access.note: The pricing page FAQ explicitly says: "Do you have an API? No, Waterfall does not currently offer a public API." Therefore there is no self-serve way to obtain API credentials.

api_surface.note: Waterfall's pricing FAQ states it does not currently offer a public API; the product instead provides access/export via dashboards and reports.

buildability.note: Waterfall states it does not currently offer a public API (pricing FAQ). Without a public API and self-serve credentials, an AI-agent integration cannot be built via standard API methods.

queries: Waterfall.io API documentation Waterfall API developer docs waterfall.io "API" "developer" "authentication"
Waterfall API site:waterfall.io OR site:help.waterfall.io "API" "developer" "authentication" "API key"
